---
name: Feature request / idea
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     READ THIS FIRST (~30 seconds, saves us both time)

     VIMATHIC is at v1.0-beta and currently NOT ACCEPTING these:

     ❌ New mathematical formulas (192 is the curated count)
     ❌ New GPU shaders (38 is intentional)
     ❌ New colour schemes (36 covers the design space)
     ❌ New shapes (20 base shapes + deformation modes cover geometry)
     ❌ New keyboard shortcuts (the hotkey surface is full)
     ❌ Major architecture refactors
     ❌ New external dependencies (currently 3: three, gif.js, micromark)

     This freeze lifts around Week 10 post-launch. See CONTRIBUTING.md
     for the full reasoning.

     If your idea is in one of the above categories, please tag the issue
     with `phase-3-consideration` — it'll be reviewed during the next
     direction-setting cycle. Don't open a PR for these without a yes
     in the issue first.

     The categories that ARE accepted right now:
     ✅ MIDI controller default mappings (Akai, Launchpad, etc.)
     ✅ Documentation improvements
     ✅ Tests against canonical references
     ✅ Bug-fix-adjacent enhancements (e.g. better error messages)
     ✅ Browser-compatibility improvements
     ✅ Performance optimisations on existing code
     ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the problem first, the solution second. -->
<!-- "I'm trying to do X but Y gets in the way" is more useful than -->
<!-- "VIMATHIC should have feature Z". -->


## What would the solution look like?

<!-- A user-facing description: what would change in the UI, hotkeys, output, -->
<!-- documentation, or workflow? -->


## Is this currently in scope?

<!-- Tick one, honestly. -->

- [ ] It's a documentation, MIDI preset, test, bug-fix-adjacent, or
      browser-compat improvement (in scope now)
- [ ] It's a new formula / shader / palette / shape / hotkey / refactor
      (frozen for Phase 0-2, please tag `phase-3-consideration`)
- [ ] I'm not sure which category it falls into

## Why this fits VIMATHIC

<!-- One paragraph. What about this request specifically benefits a -->
<!-- mathematical VJ studio with a single-file deployment, as opposed to -->
<!-- a general-purpose visualiser? -->


## What it would NOT do

<!-- Sometimes scope is clearer when stated as exclusions. -->
<!-- "This is not asking for X, Y, Z" is welcome. -->


## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other VJ tools that already do this (Butterchurn, Hydra, TouchDesigner, -->
<!-- etc.) — and why their approach doesn't fit. Optional but very helpful. -->


## Mockup or example (optional)

<!-- If you can sketch a UI, paste a screenshot from another tool, or write -->
<!-- pseudocode for an API, drop it here. -->


## Are you willing to contribute the implementation?

<!-- No pressure. But "yes" speeds things up significantly. -->

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR (let's discuss the design first)
- [ ] I'd help with testing / documentation, but not the code
- [ ] No, I'm suggesting the idea for the maintainer to consider

## Anything else?

<!-- Related issues, links, prior discussion, etc. -->
